title: Peregrine (disambiguation)
content:
'''Peregrine''' may refer to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''''[[Centennial Peregrine]]''''', a [[starship]] stolen by [[Hondo Ohnaka]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Vehicles===
*[[Peregrine (Dreadnaught-class)|'''''Peregrine''''']], a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser]] and flagship of [[General/Legends|General]] Garm Bel Iblis
*[[Peregrine (Strike-class)|'''''Peregrine''''']], a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]] [[Modified Strike Cruiser|modified]] by the Rebellion as a faux [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]]
*The '''[[Peregrine-240 swoop]]'''
*The '''[[Peregrine-340 airspeeder]]''', manufactured by [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech Repulsor Company]]
*[[Peregrine-class star yacht|'''''Peregrine''-class star yacht''']], used by the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[King/Legends|king]] [[Katuunko/Legends|Katuunko]]

===Other===
*[[Peregrine (legend)|'''Peregrine''']], a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] legend
*'''[[Peregrine's Nest]]''', the secret base of [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]' [[army]]

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|de=Peregrin (Begriffsklärung)
